title: CapTrap-Seq: Un mètode quantitatiu per a la seqüenciació completa i fidel de transcrits d'RNA
author: Carbonell-Sala, SIlvia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document contains an adapted Catalan  translation of the abstract of Carbonell-Sala et al. ‘CapTrap-Seq: A platform-agnostic and quantitative approach for high-fidelity full-length RNA sequencing”,  Nature Communications (2024),  https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-49523-3 , and an extended non-specialist summary also in Catalan
steps_raw: This document contains an adapted Catalan  translation of the abstract of Carbonell-Sala et al. ‘CapTrap-Seq: A platform-agnostic and quantitative approach for high-fidelity full-length RNA sequencing”,  Nature Communications (2024),  https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-49523-3 , and an extended non-specialist summary also in Catalan
